next_steps: Perform rapid plasma reagin (RPR) and confirmatory treponemal specific antibody testing
Biopsy skin lesions for histopathology and immunohistochemistry
Obtain antinuclear antibody (ANA) panel and extractable nuclear antigen (ENA) series
Obtain serum ferritin, iron studies, and liver function tests
Perform blood cultures if systemic inflammatory markers remain persistently elevated
Consult ophthalmology and otolaryngology if symptoms involving those systems arise
